description:
The CylindricalDistanceHapticFilter component filters haptic device influences multiplicatively depending on their position within a range of 2 cylinders. One being an inner and one being an outer. Both of them are invisible though. This component works when used with a HapticVolume.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.StartRadius: The starting radius of the intensity gradient based on distance from the cylinders center line from end to end.
fields.EndRadius: The ending radius of the intensity gradient based on distance from the cylinders center line from end to end.
fields.StartRadiusIntensity: The starting intensity of the intensity gradient based on distance from the cylinders center line from end to end.
fields.EndRadiusIntensity: The ending intensity of the intensity gradient based on distance from the cylinders center line from end to end.
fields.RadiusPower: The amplification of the intensity gradient based on distance from the cylinders center line from end to end.
fields.StartAxisOffset: Used to define the distance from the cylinder end cap to start the intensity gradient.
fields.EndAxisOffset: Used to define the distance from the cylinder end cap to end the intensity gradient.
fields.StartAxisIntensity: The starting intensity value for the intensity gradient based on the distance to the cylinder cap.
fields.EndAxisIntensity: The ending intensity value for the intensity gradient based on the distance to the cylinder cap.
fields.AxisPower: How much to amplify the intensity of the intensity gradient based on the distance to the cylinder cap.

usage: Attach to a slot with a valid and working HapticVolume to add to the list of multiplicative haptic filters.
